note: VAR (price_model.py) forecasts brent_returns from HRI/price dynamics over a rolling horizon; this model predicts next-day returns from explicit lag features. Both RMSEs are on brent_returns %, so comparable in scale, but the two experiments aren't identically designed — treat as directional evidence for the econometric-vs-ML comparison, not a strict benchmark.
interpretation: XGBoost RMSE 5.62166 vs naive-baseline RMSE 6.65074 on next-day Brent returns — XGBoost outperforms a simple persistence forecast on held-out data.
